name: Garlic Parmesan Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a large skillet.
2. Add the basil, lemon juice, garlic powder with parsley, and seasoned salt. Stir to combine.
3. Add the fettuccine, broccoli, and walnuts to the skillet. Toss everything together until well coated.
PRESENTATION:
Serve with a fresh spinach salad.
